lessons.title: Introduction to Pashto
lessons.description: An overview of the Pashto language — its origins, retroflex sounds, and 44-letter script.

lessons.title: Ahmad Shah & The Durrani Empire
lessons.description: Explore the founding of modern Afghanistan and the historical roots of the Pashtun people.

lessons.title: Pashto Poetry & The Attan
lessons.description: Discover the powerful two-line Landay poetic form and the traditional Attan dance.

lessons.title: The Code of Pashtunwali
lessons.description: A deep dive into the traditional ethical code of honor, hospitality, and justice.
